quiz.title: Kirxgof (Kirchhoff) qonunlari asosida RLC elektr zanjirlari modellari (tok va kuchlanishning sistemasi)

questions.question: Quyidagi qaysi qonun Kirxgofning birinchi qonuni sifatida tanilgan?
questions.explanation: Kirxgofning birinchi qonuni (toklar qonuni) bo'yicha, elektr zanjiridagi tugunlarga kiruvchi va chiquvchi toklar yig'indisi nolga teng (I_kiruvchi = I_chiquvchi).

questions.question: Kirxgofning ikkinchi qonuni nima ifodalaydi?

options.B: Zanjirdagi kuchlanishlarning yopiq yo'lidagi yig'indisi nolga teng
options.D: Rezistor kuchlanishi faqat R bilan bog'liq

questions.explanation: Kirxgofning ikkinchi qonuni (kuchlanishlar qonuni) bo'yicha, yopiq zanjir bo'ylab kuchlanishlarning algebraik yig'indisi nolga teng (ΣV = 0).

questions.question: RLC zanjiridagi rezistorni (R) kuchlanishi qanday ifodalanadi?
questions.explanation: Rezistor (qarshilik) kuchlanishi Om qonuni bo'yicha V_R = IR ko'rinishida bo'ladi, bu yerda I - tok kuchi, R - qarshilik.

questions.question: RLC zanjirida induktor (L) kuchlanishi qanday ifodalanadi?
questions.explanation: Induktivlik (L) kuchlanishi tokning o'zgarish tezligiga proporsional: V_L = L(dI/dt). Bu Faradey qonunining ifodasidir.

questions.question: RLC zanjirida kondensator (C) kuchlanishi qanday ifodalanadi?
questions.explanation: Kondensator (C) kuchlanishi uning zaryadiga bog'liq: V_C = Q/C = (1/C)∫Idt, bu yerda Q - kondensatordagi zaryad, I - tok.

questions.question: Zanjirda seriyali RLC uchun Kirxgofning ikkinchi qonuni asosida differensial tenglama qanday yoziladi?
questions.explanation: Seriyali RLC zanjirida Kirxgofning ikkinchi qonuni bo'yicha: L(dI/dt) + IR + (1/C)∫Idt = 0 yoki L(dI/dt) + IR + Q/C = 0, bu yerda L(dI/dt) - induktiv kuchlanish, IR - aktiv kuchlanish, Q/C - kapasitiv kuchlanish.

questions.question: Seriyali RLC zanjirida tokning umumiy differensial tenglamasi qanday bo'ladi?
questions.explanation: Integralli tenglamani t vaqt bo'yicha differensiallaganda ikkinchi tartibli ODE hosil bo'ladi: L(d²I/dt²) + R(dI/dt) + (1/C)I = 0.

questions.question: Seriyali RLC zanjirida tebranish turi qaysi omillarga bog'liq?
questions.explanation: RLC zanjirida tebranish turi (so'nimlanishli, kritik so'nimlanishli yoki so'nimsiz) R, L va C barcha uchta kattalikka bog'liq. Ayniqsa, R² va 4L/C nisbatiga qarab aniqlanadi.

questions.question: Zanjirda kritik so'nimlanish qachon sodir bo'ladi?
questions.explanation: Kritik so'nimlanish (critical damping) R² = 4L/C shartida yuzaga keladi. Bu holatda zanjir eng tez orada muvozanat holatiga yetadi va tebranishsiz. Agar R² < 4L/C bo'lsa so'nimsiz tebranish, R² > 4L/C bo'lsa so'nimlanishli holat bo'ladi.

questions.question: Quyidagi ifodalardan qaysi biri kondensator orqali o'tgan tok va uning kuchlanishiga bog'liq?
questions.explanation: Kondensator uchun I = dQ/dt va Q = CV, shuning uchun I = C(dV/dt). Bu kondensator tokining kuchlanish o'zgarish tezligiga proporsionalligini ifodalaydi.

metadata.subject: Matematika (Elektrotexnika)
metadata.topic: RLC elektr zanjiri modellari va Kirxgof qonunlari
